title: User should be able to bookmark posts and view them later
description: The system shall allow a user to mark a post as bookmarked.
rationale: This requirement enables users to save posts they find interesting for later access, enhancing the overall usability and satisfaction of the platform.
business_value: Improved user experience by providing easy access to previously saved content, leading to increased engagement and time spent on the platform.

source.description: As a user I need to bookmark posts and view them later in a saved list So that I can easily access and revisit posts I find interesting

acceptance_criteria: Given I am logged in as a user
Then the post should be added to my saved list
When I navigate to my saved list
Then I should see all my bookmarked posts
postconditions: Post is added to the user's saved list
edge_cases: User logs out while trying to bookmark a post
Post is deleted after being bookmarked by the user

interfaces.name: User Interface
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with the user interface to allow users to mark posts as bookmarked and access their saved list.

interfaces.name: User Database
interfaces.description: The requirement interacts with a database to store and retrieve the list of bookmarked posts for each user.

test_cases.description: User bookmarks a post while logged in.
test_cases.expected_result: Post is added to the user's saved list.

test_cases.description: User attempts to bookmark a post while not logged in.
test_cases.expected_result: System displays an error message and prevents the post from being bookmarked.

test_cases.description: User navigates to their saved list after bookmarking several posts.
test_cases.expected_result: All bookmarked posts are displayed in the saved list.
